name: member-list-manager
description: LINE Webhook based member list manager system utilizing Google Apps Script.

scripts.test: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); eval(fs.readFileSync('config.js', 'utf8') + fs.readFileSync('log.js', 'utf8') + fs.readFileSync('process.js', 'utf8') + fs.readFileSync('webhook.js', 'utf8') + fs.readFileSync('test.js', 'utf8')); runTests();"
